title: Multicolor Plastic & Thermo Rubber Toothbrushes, 15.5cm x 1.5cm (Pack of 4) - Precision Contouring Design for Comprehensive Teeth & Gum Cleaning
features: COMPREHENSIVE CLEANING DESIGN: Our toothbrushes boast a precision contouring design with specialized bristles that ensure thorough cleaning of teeth and gums, reaching even hard-to-clean areas effortlessly.
PREMIUM MATERIALS FOR DURABILITY: Constructed with high-quality plastic and thermo rubber, these toothbrushes promise both durability and comfort during each use.

OPTIMAL SIZE FOR COMFORT: Each toothbrush measures 15.5cm x 1.5cm, designed for a comfortable grip that makes reaching all areas of your mouth easier. No more struggling with oversized or uncomfortable toothbrushes.

VERSATILE FOR ALL AGES: These toothbrushes are suitable for people of all ages, making them a practical choice for families. From children to adults, everyone can benefit from the ergonomic design and advanced bristle technology.

MULTICOLOR PACK FOR FAMILY CONVENIENCE: Each pack contains 4 toothbrushes in various colors of blue, red, green, and violet, making it easy to differentiate between users, perfect for family households.
description: Product Description This toothbrush also has an easy-to-grip handle to provide comfort and control while brushing. Safety Warning No warning applicable
